nasb.text: But the king said to Absalom, “No, my son, we should not all go, for we will be burdensome to you.” Although he urged him, he would not go, but blessed him.

esv.text: But the king said to Absalom, “No, my son, let us not all go, lest we be burdensome to you.” He pressed him, but he would not go but gave him his blessing.

cnv.text: 王對押沙龍說：“不！我兒，我們不必都去，免得我們成為你的重擔。”押沙龍再三勉強王去，王還是不肯去，只是為他祝福。

ccb.text: 王说：“我儿，我们不必都去打扰你。”押沙龙再三邀请，王还是推辞了，但他为押沙龙祝福。
